overview: To become a center of excellence in textile education, training and research by accommodating the outcome based teaching learning techniques and the best academic practices. Deliver knowledge and share experiences to produce competent graduates with engineering and good leadership qualities capable of meeting the challenges of the rapidly changing textile industry. Collaborate with local textiles, apparel and allied industries for practical learning, project-based problem solution and job placement.
waiver_info: Result-based waiver (Bachelor's), Waiver on SGPA (Semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Player quota, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota, And many more.
eligibility: Students must have a minimum C grade in Physics, Chemistry & Math both in SSC & HSC or equivalent. If a student has done HSC in Business Studies or equivalent, s/he must have a minimum 7.0 CGPA in HSC. If a student has passed O-Level & A-Level, s/he must have a minimum 2 A-Level 2 O-Level. If a student has passed HSC with 4th subject or A-Level with 2 principal & 2 subsidiary subjects, s/he is also eligible to apply. Out of these 7 subjects, s/he must have studied Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics) and Biology/Mathematics/Computer Science. Minimum GPA in these 3 subjects have to be at least 3.0 and minimum GPA in total have to be at least 3.0. If not, s/he is not acceptable.
intake: Spring: Jan-Apr | Summer: May-Aug | Fall: Sep-Dec
